text: Amazon Translate - Use Cases @ nsesncna @ swcnen e Multilingual user experience * .. meeting notes, posts, communications, articles e .. emails, in-game chat, customer live chat e Translate incoming data (social media/news/communications) * Language-independence for other AWS services e .. comprehend, transcribe, polly, data stored in S3, RDS, DDB .. e Commonly integrates with other services/Apps/platforms
